allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\Workspace\\HoldemServer\\server"; $proc = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; $proc.Kill\(\))
